message:
fix(net): resolve silent use-after-free file descriptor reuse race

Struct fields drop top-to-bottom in Rust. The file descriptor (Arc<net::TcpStream> etc) was previously declared before the reactor IoRegistration. This caused the fd to be closed by the OS *before* the IoRegistration was dropped and deregistered from epoll/kqueue. If the OS reassigned the same fd to another thread in that tiny window, the deregistration would erroneously remove the *new* file descriptor from the reactor, breaking I/O notifications for unrelated tasks.
